properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the waves dash against the boulders And my ship's tossed on an angry sea, I feel Your hand rest gently on my shoulder, You guide me home and still the storm in me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In Your arms, I'm safe inside the harbor, In Your arms, my heart can rest at ease, Walk with me beside the quiet waters, In Your arms is where I long to be.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Even if the rainbow's colors faded And the sun stopped shining from above, No power on Earth nor anything created, Could ever separate me from Your love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In Your arms, I'm safe inside the harbor, In Your arms, my heart can rest at ease, Walk with me beside the quiet waters, In Your arms is where I long to be (long to be), In Your arms is where I long to be.
